description_long: This handgun features a blocky, modern design with a matte dark gray finish and a slightly lighter gray section on the upper slide. The frame is angular, with a prominent rectangular trigger guard and a straight, squared-off grip. The slide is relatively thick and flat, with minimal external detailing, and the barrel is not visibly protruding from the front. The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, contributing to the weapon's compact profile. There are no visible engravings or logos on the slide, and the overall appearance is utilitarian and robust. The handgun's surfaces are smooth with subtle paneling, and the grip appears to be untextured.
description: A compact, blocky handgun with a matte dark gray finish, angular frame, and a flat, flush magazine base. The design is utilitarian with minimal external markings or embellishments.
description_view_0: The front view shows the squared-off muzzle and the flat, wide slide with a subtle rectangular indentation on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the angular grip, rectangular trigger guard, and the two-tone slide with a lighter gray section.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide and grip, with a rectangular indentation and a flush magazine base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the blocky frame, straight grip, and minimalistic slide design.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is straight and rectangular with a smooth, untextured surface, lacking any visible checkering, stippling, or ergonomic finger grooves. It appears to be made of polymer or a similar material, with a matte finish and no visible logos or embellishments. The base of the grip is flat and flush with the magazine, contributing to a compact profile.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rectangular and thick, with straight edges and a flat bottom. It lacks curvature or undercuts and does not feature any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is utilitarian and robust, with no integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is not visibly protruding from the slide and appears to be of standard length, fully enclosed within the blocky slide. There are no external features such as threading, porting, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte dark gray of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with only subtle paneling and a lighter gray section on the upper portion.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extension, bevel, flare, or finger rest. It is simple and untextured, maintaining the handgun's compact and utilitarian appearance.
